headline: Schema showcase — every root field, section type, and item option
summary: Kitchen-sink example aligned with JSON_Schema.json: required fields (rank, headline, sections) plus optional date_confirmed, sources_confirmed, summary, and meta. Sections demonstrate bullet_list (text + optional note), cards (category, title, description, cta_label, cta_url), timeline (date optional), quotes (speaker, role), stats (string or number value, context), links (label, url, source), and generic blocks (bullet, text, link, stat, quote). Meta uses documented keys plus extra keys allowed by additionalProperties.

sections.title: North star and guardrails
sections.description: Bullets support optional notes for caveats and owners.

items.text: Ship unified billing in EU by July without regressing US latency.
Maintain SOC 2 and GDPR DPA commitments during migration.
Single dashboard for revenue recognition discrepancies under 0.5%.

items.title: Pricing & packaging
items.description: New tiers, grandfathering rules, and in-app messaging for existing accounts.

items.title: Data plane split
items.description: Region-local writes with global read path; feature flags per tenant.

items.title: Contracts
items.description: DPA updates, subprocessors, and breach notification SLAs.

items.title: Card without category
items.description: category is optional when the card is self-explanatory.

items.text: Pending: finalize comms date with marketing (no fixed date yet).

items.quote: We will not trade customer trust for a faster launch.
items.speaker: CEO

items.quote: Observability budget is part of the definition of done.
items.speaker: CTO

items.quote: If the brief is unclear, pause and rewrite — ambiguity is debt.

sections.title: Appendix — structured freeform
sections.description: Demonstrates rapid alternation between block kinds in one titled section.

items.text: Use this pattern when a single narrative must combine prose, citations, metrics, and pull quotes without exploding into many top-level sections.
Hypothesis: dual-write window stays under four weeks if freeze discipline holds.
Risk: vendor API rate limits during backfill.

items.quote: Complexity belongs in systems we can test, not in the brief.
items.speaker: Principal engineer

items.text: End of schema showcase — ids stay lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens; URIs validate; sources_confirmed entries are unique.
